speaker: Jason
en: Good morning, Smart Travel, Jason speaking.

speaker: Woman
en: Hi, good morning.

speaker: Woman
en: I saw your advert in today's paper about hot air balloon trips.

speaker: Woman
en: It sounds pretty exciting, and I wonder how much it costs.

speaker: Jason
en: Well, the price may vary depending on the location, number of participants and add-ons.

speaker: Jason
en: A single ride may cost you up to 280 pounds per person.

speaker: Jason
en: But if you choose group booking, there is a discount.

speaker: Jason
en: And the cheapest flight is 125 pounds each for a group booking of at least ten people.

speaker: Woman
en: Oh, that's not too bad.

speaker: Woman
en: What do you mean by add-ons?

speaker: Jason
en: They are optional items like taking photos for you during the ride, champagne and sit-down breakfast after the flight.

speaker: Jason
en: Upon completing the trip, we will provide each participant with a certificate.

speaker: Jason
en: And that is entirely free of charge.

speaker: Woman
en: Can I book a ride over the phone?

speaker: Jason
en: Yes, that's an option.

speaker: Jason
en: Reservations can be made one year ahead of your trip by telephone.

speaker: Jason
en: But to pick a specific date, you must book online.

speaker: Jason
en: A confirmation email will be sent to you right afterwards.

speaker: Woman
en: How high can the balloons go?

speaker: Jason
en: A hot air balloon's height is limited by the temperature of the air and how much fuel it can carry.

speaker: Jason
en: And the highest altitude ever recorded for a ride is 1800 metres.

speaker: Jason
en: But most rides stay below 300 metres.

speaker: Woman
en: Oh boy.

speaker: Woman
en: That's impressive.

speaker: Woman
en: How long is a single ride?

speaker: Jason
en: The average hot air balloon ride lasts about an hour.

speaker: Jason
en: The entire ballooning experience, which includes ground preparation, flight and post-flight packing up and celebration, may take two to three hours.

speaker: Woman
en: And what time are the flights?

speaker: Jason
en: Our flights generally meet about an hour before sunrise on the day.

speaker: Jason
en: You will be notified of the exact meeting time the evening before your flight.

speaker: Jason
en: Night flights are avoided due to weather conditions.

speaker: Woman
en: Fair enough.

speaker: Woman
en: Which month do you recommend for a hot air balloon trip?

speaker: Jason
en: Autumn is the best time of year to take the trip.

speaker: Jason
en: Not only can you see the changing hues of the trees from above, but it is a great way to spend time with the whole family before it gets too cold.

speaker: Woman
en: I see.

speaker: Jason
en: But please note that our flight may be cancelled, and you will be notified by phone the day before.

speaker: Woman
en: Why is that?

speaker: Jason
en: It can be quite dangerous to fly under bad weather conditions like a thunderstorm.

speaker: Jason
en: So our experienced pilots will not go under such conditions.

speaker: Woman
en: What should I wear for the ride?

speaker: Jason
en: We suggest wearing comfortable clothing like a jacket.

speaker: Jason
en: Multiple layers are always better.

speaker: Jason
en: Wearing a helmet for safety concerns is also a good idea.

speaker: Jason
en: Sandals are not permitted.

speaker: Woman
en: Can children or older people participate?

speaker: Jason
en: All children must be above the minimum age of 9 years old.

speaker: Jason
en: And they have to be accompanied by at least a parent or guardian.

speaker: Jason
en: However, an adult has no age limit as long as they meet the health requirements.

speaker: Woman
en: What exactly are the health requirements?

speaker: Jason
en: Participants must at least be in fair physical condition.

speaker: Jason
en: For example, they shall have no significant knee, hip or back problems and no recent surgeries or broken bones.

speaker: Jason
en: They must also stand unassisted for an hour during the flight.

speaker: Jason
en: It is the required position during the whole flight.

speaker: Jason
en: As the balloon comes to land, all passengers will need to adopt the landing position with knees bent in front of them.

speaker: Woman
en: Are those rides safe?

speaker: Jason
en: Hot air balloon companies are required to have a Commercial Balloon Pilot licence, and all our pilots go through rigorous training before they are allowed to fly.

speaker: Jason
en: It is a relatively gentle activity.

speaker: Jason
en: However, the impact of a balloon landing can vary drastically depending on factors like wind speed.

speaker: Jason
en: Sometimes it is similar to the momentum of jumping off a small chair.

speaker: Jason
en: If you cannot jump off a small chair, speaking to your doctor before booking a balloon flight is best.

speaker: Woman
en: Thank you very much.

speaker: Woman
en: I think that's all I need to know.

speaker: Jason
en: Thanks for calling.

speaker: Jason
en: Goodbye.
